title: Python Packaging Typing Tools
description: Practice a typed function shaped like reusable package code.
learningGoals: Keep reusable module code small and explicit.

completionChecks.explanation: The arrow annotation describes the value the function returns.

completionChecks.prompt: Do Python type hints enforce values at runtime by themselves?
choices: Yes, every call is checked automatically
No, they are metadata for tools and readers
completionChecks.explanation: Type hints help tools and readers; Python does not enforce them automatically at runtime.

targetCode:
# Learn: Write reusable Python with type hints.
def normalize(names: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    return [name.strip().title() for name in names]  # Tooling can inspect the hint.

users = normalize([" ada ", " grace "])
print(users)
